component.name: ButtonArrow
component.description: 32px circular prev/next navigation button. Uses an Icon chevron internally. direction prop selects left or right. Disabled state: no background, muted icon, pointer-events blocked. Used in carousel paginators and chapter/slider navigators.

when: Navigating backward or forward through a carousel of cards
Stepping through chapters or slides in a sequence
Disabling the left arrow when at the start of a sequence, and the right arrow at the end

patterns.name: carousel-paginator
patterns.description: A pair of ButtonArrow components flanking or below a carousel row, with the left disabled at the start and right disabled at the end.

antiPatterns.scenario: Using ButtonArrow as a general-purpose icon button
antiPatterns.reason: ButtonArrow is sized and styled for directional sequence navigation only. Its small 32px size and circular shape signal a specific role.
antiPatterns.alternative: Use Button with shape=round for general icon-only actions.

antiPatterns.reason: The component sets aria-label automatically ('Previous' / 'Next') from the direction prop. Do not override with an empty string.
antiPatterns.alternative: Pass a more specific aria-label via rest props if the context requires it (e.g. 'Previous course').

purpose.left: Chevron-left icon. Navigates to the previous item. Set disabled when at the start of the sequence.
purpose.right: Chevron-right icon. Navigates to the next item. Set disabled when at the end of the sequence.

states.description: Border darkens to border-strong; background unchanged.
No background, default border, muted icon color; pointer-events none.

ariaAttributes: aria-label — automatically set to 'Previous' or 'Next' from the direction prop; override via rest props for more specific context

keyboardInteractions.action: Moves focus to the next focusable element

accessibility.notes: Uses a native <button> element. The disabled prop sets the HTML disabled attribute and also applies pointer-events: none via CSS.
